emails.subject: FW: NEPCO Earnings
emails.body: FW: NEPCO Earnings What is the purpose of this meeting?

emails.subject: RE: NEPCO Earnings
emails.body: RE: NEPCO Earnings Given the deterioration in outlook for several of the Nepco projects--especially Kendall, Jenks, and Linden there are significant potential losses that may need to be recognized this quarter. I wanted to make sure there was full understanding of the situation and discussion regarding our approach.

emails.subject: RE: NEPCO Earnings
emails.body: I have asked Corporate where it will be reported in the 4th qtr, if it's not going to be reported as wholesale then there is no real reason to bother Wes.
